page.primary_keyword: Marbella yacht charter dietary restrictions catering
page.title: Dietary Restrictions on Marbella Yacht Charters: Catering Guide

data.meta_description: Plan your Marbella yacht charter with dietary restrictions catered for. From gluten-free to halal, we guide you on menus, providers, and boat amenities.
data.summary: A practical guide for guests with dietary restrictions on Marbella yacht charters. Covers catering options, onboard provisions, and how to arrange special meals for gluten-free, vegan, halal, and other needs.
key_facts: All charters include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks.
We can arrange gluten-free, vegan, vegetarian, halal, or kosher menus on request.
Puerto Banús has several specialist delis and caterers for special diets.
Boats have a fridge and galley; let us know 48 hours before departure.
Skipper and crew are happy to accommodate allergies – just inform us in advance.
No extra charge for standard dietary swaps; premium catering may add €15–30/person.
All boats depart from Puerto Banús, close to Marbella's best food shops.

faq.q: Can you cater for gluten-free diets on a Marbella yacht charter?
faq.a: Yes, absolutely. Just let us know at least 48 hours before your charter. We stock gluten-free bread, pasta, snacks, and can arrange a gluten-free barbecue or picnic. Our standard light snacks include fruit and nuts, which are naturally gluten-free.

faq.q: Do you offer vegan or vegetarian catering on board?
faq.a: We do. Our standard drinks package is vegan-friendly, and we can swap the light snacks for hummus, vegetable crudités, falafel, or plant-based tapas. For a full meal, we can pre-order from local vegan-friendly caterers in Marbella.

faq.q: Can you accommodate halal dietary requirements?
faq.a: Yes, we can arrange halal-certified meat and meals. Please inform us when booking. We source from trusted halal butchers and caterers in Marbella. The boat’s kitchen and utensils are cleaned beforehand to avoid cross-contamination.

faq.q: Is kosher food available on yacht charters in Marbella?
faq.a: Kosher catering can be arranged with advance notice (minimum 3 days). We work with a kosher-certified provider in Marbella who can supply pre-packed meals, snacks, and drinks. The boat’s galley can be prepared for kosher service.

faq.q: What if I have a nut allergy or other severe food allergy?
faq.a: Safety is our priority. Please detail all allergies at booking. We avoid cross-contamination by using separate utensils and preparation areas. Our standard snacks are nut-free on request, and we can provide an allergen-free menu from our caterers.

faq.q: Do you charge extra for dietary restriction catering?
faq.a: For simple swaps (e.g., gluten-free bread, vegan snacks) there is no extra charge. For fully customised menus or premium catering (e.g., kosher, halal platters), there may be a supplement of €15–30 per person, depending on the menu.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food or drinks on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own provisions. Our boats have fridges and coolers. However, our inclusive drinks and snacks package already covers most needs. If you bring your own, please avoid glass bottles for safety.

faq.q: How far in advance should I inform you about dietary needs?
faq.a: We recommend at least 48 hours’ notice for standard dietary restrictions (gluten-free, vegan, vegetarian) and 72 hours for halal, kosher, or complex allergies. This gives us time to source the right products and prepare the boat.

data.body_html:
When you book a Marbella yacht charter, the last thing you want is to worry about what you can eat. Whether you follow a gluten-free, vegan, halal, or kosher diet, or have food allergies, we make sure your day on the water is delicious and stress-free. Our standard packages already include drinks and light snacks, but we go further to accommodate your dietary restrictions with proper planning. This guide explains everything you need to know about catering for special diets on our fleet, which departs from Puerto Banús.

What’s included in every charter

Every boat rental from our fleet comes with a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and a drinks package: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, plus light snacks like crisps, nuts, and fruit. This is all included in the price – no hidden extras. For guests with dietary restrictions, the standard snacks can be swapped for suitable alternatives at no extra cost. Just tell us when you book.

Gluten-free catering on board

Coeliac guests or those avoiding gluten can relax. We stock gluten-free bread, crackers, and pasta on request. For lunch, we can arrange a gluten-free barbecue with fresh fish, grilled vegetables, and salads. Alternatively, a picnic platter with gluten-free tapas, olives, and cheese works perfectly. Our providers in Marbella are experienced in gluten-free preparation. Let us know 48 hours ahead.

Vegan and vegetarian options

Our standard drinks are vegan-friendly, and the snack selection can be replaced with hummus, vegetable sticks, falafel, and dairy-free dips. For a full meal, we order from local plant-based caterers who deliver to Puerto Banús. Think quinoa salads, stuffed peppers, and fresh fruit skewers. We also offer vegan wine and cava on request. No extra charge for standard swaps.

Halal and kosher catering

Halal-certified meat and meals are available with 72 hours’ notice. We source from trusted halal butchers in Marbella. The boat’s galley is cleaned beforehand to avoid cross-contamination. Kosher catering requires a minimum of 3 days’ notice and is arranged via a kosher-certified provider in Marbella. Pre-packed kosher meals, snacks, and drinks can be delivered to your boat. Both options may carry a small supplement (€15–30 per person) depending on the menu.

Managing allergies and severe intolerances

If you have a nut allergy, shellfish allergy, or any other severe food intolerance, we take extra precautions. Separate utensils and preparation surfaces are used. Our standard snacks are nut-free on request. We can also arrange a completely allergen-free menu from our caterers. Please detail all allergies at the time of booking so we can brief the skipper and crew.

How to arrange special catering

Simply add your dietary requirements when you book your Marbella yacht charter. We’ll confirm the menu options and any supplements. For complex needs, we may call you to discuss details. All boats have a fridge and basic galley, so we can store and prepare your food safely. We recommend ordering any additional catering at least 48 hours before departure.

Can I bring my own food?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drinks. However, please avoid glass bottles for safety reasons. Our inclusive package already covers most needs, so bringing extras is rarely necessary. If you have specific brands or items you trust, feel free. The boat’s cooler will keep everything fresh.

Local providers and shopping in Puerto Banús

Puerto Banús is home to several gourmet supermarkets and delis that cater to dietary restrictions. You’ll find organic, gluten-free, and vegan products at shops like Supercor and local health food stores. If you prefer to shop yourself before boarding, we can recommend the best spots near the marina. Our team can also pre-order and have everything ready on the boat for your arrival.

Frequently asked questions

Can you cater for gluten-free diets on a Marbella yacht charter?

Yes, absolutely. Just let us know at least 48 hours before your charter. We stock gluten-free bread, pasta, snacks, and can arrange a gluten-free barbecue or picnic. Our standard light snacks include fruit and nuts, which are naturally gluten-free.

Do you offer vegan or vegetarian catering on board?

We do. Our standard drinks package is vegan-friendly, and we can swap the light snacks for hummus, vegetable crudités, falafel, or plant-based tapas. For a full meal, we can pre-order from local vegan-friendly caterers in Marbella.

Can you accommodate halal dietary requirements?

Yes, we can arrange halal-certified meat and meals. Please inform us when booking. We source from trusted halal butchers and caterers in Marbella. The boat’s kitchen and utensils are cleaned beforehand to avoid cross-contamination.

Is kosher food available on yacht charters in Marbella?

Kosher catering can be arranged with advance notice (minimum 3 days). We work with a kosher-certified provider in Marbella who can supply pre-packed meals, snacks, and drinks. The boat’s galley can be prepared for kosher service.

What if I have a nut allergy or other severe food allergy?

Safety is our priority. Please detail all allergies at booking. We avoid cross-contamination by using separate utensils and preparation areas. Our standard snacks are nut-free on request, and we can provide an allergen-free menu from our caterers.

Do you charge extra for dietary restriction catering?

For simple swaps (e.g., gluten-free bread, vegan snacks) there is no extra charge. For fully customised menus or premium catering (e.g., kosher, halal platters), there may be a supplement of €15–30 per person, depending on the menu.

Can I bring my own food or drinks on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own provisions. Our boats have fridges and coolers. However, our inclusive drinks and snacks package already covers most needs. If you bring your own, please avoid glass bottles for safety.

How far in advance should I inform you about dietary needs?

We recommend at least 48 hours’ notice for standard dietary restrictions (gluten-free, vegan, vegetarian) and 72 hours for halal, kosher, or complex allergies. This gives us time to source the right products and prepare the boat.

Ready to book your stress-free day on the water? Explore our fleet and let us know your dietary needs. We’ll make sure every bite is as enjoyable as the sea views.
